creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195333
chessx-1.4.6.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates games/chessx to 1.4.6 .

Changes by upstream:
- too many to list them all
- detailed info can be taken from the ChangeLog file

Changes to the port:
- changed from Qt4 to Qt5
- updated COMMENT
- updated pkg-descr
- sorted OPTIONS alphabetically
- rebased files/patch-chessx.pro
- removed files/patch-src__database__threaded__guess.cpp


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4-, 11.1-, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-CURRENT @r336303) for each i386 + amd64 archs -> OK
- portlint -> OK
